stimulus: In a 2015 essay collection, journalist Dana Holloway describes how her grandmother’s small grocery store in Detroit, Michigan, ______blank as a gathering place for neighbors during the 1960s.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The relative clause introduced by “how” requires a finite verb. The finite past tense verb “functioned” correctly indicates what the grocery store did during the 1960s.

Choice B is the nonfinite present participle and cannot serve as the main verb of the clause. Choice C is the nonfinite perfect participle and cannot serve as the main verb. Choice D is the nonfinite to-infinitive and cannot serve as the main verb.
